'''âs-j-h''' ('''kasajah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:impeople|impeople]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-j-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:impeople|impeople]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-j-h
|-
! Lemma
| kasajah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisajah|thisajah]] || [[word:jisajah|jisajah]] || [[word:shisajah|shisajah]] || [[word:kisajah|kisajah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusajah|thuthusajah]] || [[word:jujusajah|jujusajah]] || [[word:shushusajah|shushusajah]] || [[word:kukusajah|kukusajah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusajah|thusajah]] || [[word:jusajah|jusajah]] || [[word:shusajah|shusajah]] || [[word:kusajah|kusajah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusajah|thusajah]] || [[word:jusajah|jusajah]] || [[word:shusajah|shusajah]] || [[word:kusajah|kusajah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesajah|thesajah]] || [[word:jesajah|jesajah]] || [[word:shesajah|shesajah]] || [[word:kesajah|kesajah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosajah|thothosajah]] || [[word:jojosajah|jojosajah]] || [[word:shoshosajah|shoshosajah]] || [[word:kokosajah|kokosajah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosajah|thosajah]] || [[word:josajah|josajah]] || [[word:shosajah|shosajah]] || [[word:kosajah|kosajah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosajah|thosajah]] || [[word:josajah|josajah]] || [[word:shosajah|shosajah]] || [[word:kosajah|kosajah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsajah|thĂŠsajah]] || [[word:jĂŠsajah|jĂŠsajah]] || [[word:shĂŠsajah|shĂŠsajah]] || [[word:kĂŠsajah|kĂŠsajah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasajah|thathasajah]] || [[word:jajasajah|jajasajah]] || [[word:shashasajah|shashasajah]] || [[word:kakasajah|kakasajah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasajah|thasajah]] || [[word:jasajah|jasajah]] || [[word:shasajah|shasajah]] || [[word:kasajah|kasajah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasajah|thasajah]] || [[word:jasajah|jasajah]] || [[word:shasajah|shasajah]] || [[word:kasajah|kasajah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasajah|shasajah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasajah|goshasajah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasajah|gokishasajah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasajahnĂŒ|shasajahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasajahnknĂŒ|goshasajahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasajahnĂŒ|gokishasajahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasajahshĂ«|shasajahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasajahnkshĂ«|goshasajahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasajahshĂ«|gokishasajahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasajahro|shasajahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasajahnkro|goshasajahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasajahro|gokishasajahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasajahmu|shasajahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasajahnkmu|goshasajahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasajahmu|gokishasajahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasajahsher|shasajahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasajahnksher|goshasajahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasajahsher|gokishasajahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasajahng|shasajahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasajahnkng|goshasajahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasajahng|gokishasajahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasajahya|shasajahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasajahnkya|goshasajahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasajahya|gokishasajahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasajahyam|shasajahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasajahnkyam|goshasajahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasajahyam|gokishasajahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasajahnĂŒshĂ«|shasajahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasajahnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasajahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasajahnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasajahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasajahnĂŒro|shasajahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasajahnknĂŒro|goshasajahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasajahnĂŒro|gokishasajahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasajahnĂŒmu|shasajahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasajahnknĂŒmu|goshasajahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasajahnĂŒmu|gokishasajahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasajahshĂ«nĂŒ|shasajahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasajahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasajahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasajahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasajahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasajahshĂ«ro|shasajahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasajahnkshĂ«ro|goshasajahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasajahshĂ«ro|gokishasajahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasajahshĂ«mu|shasajahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasajahnkshĂ«mu|goshasajahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasajahshĂ«mu|gokishasajahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasajahronĂŒ|shasajahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasajahnkronĂŒ|goshasajahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasajahronĂŒ|gokishasajahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasajahroshĂ«|shasajahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasajahnkroshĂ«|goshasajahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasajahroshĂ«|gokishasajahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasajahromu|shasajahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasajahnkromu|goshasajahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasajahromu|gokishasajahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasajahmunĂŒ|shasajahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasajahnkmunĂŒ|goshasajahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasajahmunĂŒ|gokishasajahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasajahmushĂ«|shasajahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasajahnkmushĂ«|goshasajahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasajahmushĂ«|gokishasajahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasajahmuro|shasajahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasajahnkmuro|goshasajahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasajahmuro|gokishasajahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
